mentions.occurrence_sentence: At SCALINQ, we develop high-performance hardware—such as advanced RF packaging and cryogenic components—to enable the scaling of quantum computers.
At SCALINQ, we develop high-performance hardware—such as advanced RF packaging and cryogenic components—to enable the scaling of quantum computers.
Rooted in research from Chalmers University of Technology, our team blends global expertise in quantum engineering with Gothenburg's collaborative spirit and drive for innovation.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: We aim to solve the inevitable problems when scaling quantum bits in superconducting and spin-qubit-based processors through high density components. Stemming from research, we develop novel hardware solutions which simplify the advancements of quantum computers.
